metadata.description: Convert files of any format into Open Knowledge Format (OKF) bundles

plugins.name: anything-to-okf
plugins.description: Convert files of ANY format — PDF, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, HTML, Markdown, JSON/YAML, source code, plain text, images — into an Open Knowledge Format (OKF) bundle: a directory of markdown files with YAML frontmatter, cross-links, and index.md files.
